sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الرِّيَاضَةُ فِي تَقْوِيَةِ الْعَضَلَاتِ وَتَحْسِينِ الْمِزَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Tjelovježba pomaže u jačanju mišića i poboljšanju raspoloženja.
sentences.translationEn: Exercise helps in strengthening muscles and improving mood.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro šetam parkom trideset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park for thirty minutes every morning.

sentences.arabic: النَّشَاطُ الْبَدَنِيُّ يَجْعَلُ الْقَلْبَ أَقْوَى وَالْجِسْمَ أَكْثَرَ نَشَاطًا.
sentences.translation: Fizička aktivnost čini srce jačim i tijelo aktivnijim.
sentences.translationEn: Physical activity makes the heart stronger and the body more active.
